help.title: Help Center
help.subtitle: Welcome to the embedded system management platform. For any questions, please check the FAQs below or contact technical support.
help.howToAddDevice: How to add a new device?
help.howToAddDeviceAnswer: Go to Device Management > Device List, click the "Add Device" button in the upper right corner, fill in the device information and save.
help.howToViewMonitor: How to view device monitoring data?
help.howToViewMonitorAnswer: Go to Device Management > Device Monitor, select the device you want to view to see real-time monitoring data.
help.howToExportLogsAnswer: Go to Log Center > System Logs/Operation Logs/Error Logs, select the time range and click the "Export" button.
help.forgotPassword: What if I forgot my password?
help.forgotPasswordAnswer: Click the "Forgot Password" link on the login page and follow the prompts to reset your password. If you still can't solve it, please contact administrator.

user.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to logout?
